title: planchonella merrillii
intro: Planchonella merrillii, also known as the Philippine plum or Maypaw, is a species of fruit-bearing tree native to the Philippines. Its bark, leaves, and fruits have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Planchonella merrillii are attributed to its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Planchonella merrillii can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health issues in traditional medicine.
